title: andryala cossyrensis
intro: Andryala cossyrensis, also known as Sardinian andryala, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Andryala cossyrensis include its ability to reduce inflammation and aid in wound healing, as well as its potential to alleviate digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Andryala cossyrensis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which are often used to make teas or topical applications.
